metadata.name: blip_protocol_v2
metadata.description: Blip Protocol v2 - Hardened settlement layer with fee enforcement

instructions.name: accept_trade
docs: Accept a funded trade as the counterparty

accounts.name: acceptor
docs: The party accepting/joining the trade as counterparty

instructions.name: cancel_trade_mutual
docs: Mutual cancellation — both parties co-sign. Allowed only in
Funded/Locked. Refunds to depositor; closes escrow.

accounts.name: counterparty_signer
docs: Trade counterparty (buyer). Must sign. In Funded state counterparty
has not yet been set (== default); we allow creator_signer to fill
this slot. In Locked state this MUST be the real counterparty.

instructions.name: confirm_payment
docs: CRITICAL: After this, auto-refund is FORBIDDEN

instructions.name: create_lane
docs: Create a liquidity lane for atomic matching

instructions.name: emergency_refund_v2
docs: Emergency refund for V2.2 legacy accounts
Use this to refund accounts created before the V2.3 upgrade
that cannot be deserialized by the current program

accounts.name: trade
docs: V2.2 Trade account - NOT deserialized, read raw bytes

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Escrow account - same structure in V2.2 and V2.3

accounts.name: depositor_ata
docs: Depositor's token account to receive refund

accounts.name: depositor
docs: Depositor who funded the escrow (must be signer)

instructions.name: fund_escrow
docs: Fund escrow WITHOUT counterparty (open for acceptance)
Use this when you want to fund first and let someone join later

instructions.name: fund_lane
docs: Fund a liquidity lane (merchant deposits tokens)

instructions.name: lock_escrow
docs: Lock escrow (deposit funds WITH counterparty in one step)
Use this when you know the counterparty upfront

instructions.name: match_offer
docs: Match a signed offer (v2.1 - with signature verification)

accounts.name: matcher
docs: Matcher (pays PDA rent, anyone can match valid offers)

instructions.name: match_offer_and_lock_from_lane
docs: Match offer and lock escrow atomically from lane (PRIMARY PATH)
This is a single-transaction, instant matching flow using prefunded lane liquidity

accounts.name: matcher
docs: Matcher (pays PDA rent, anyone can match)

accounts.name: mint
docs: Mint must match lane's mint (verified in handler)

instructions.name: open_dispute
docs: Open a dispute on the trade
Either party can call when in Locked or PaymentSent state

accounts.name: initiator
docs: Party initiating the dispute (must be seller or buyer)

accounts.name: signer
docs: Signer — authorization is state-dependent (checked in handler).

accounts.name: recipient_ata
docs: Recipient ATA - will be either buyer or seller depending on resolution

accounts.name: treasury_ata
docs: Treasury ATA for fees (only used if releasing to buyer)

instructions.name: resolve_dispute_timeout
docs: Permissionless fallback: refunds a Disputed trade to its depositor
once more than `DISPUTE_WINDOW` (72h) has elapsed since open_dispute.

instructions.name: withdraw_lane
docs: Withdraw from liquidity lane (merchant withdraws available funds)

errors.name: FeeOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Fee is outside allowed bounds [min, max]

errors.name: InvalidTreasury
errors.msg: Treasury account does not match protocol config

errors.name: InvalidTradeState
errors.msg: Trade is in invalid state for this operation

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized signer for this operation

errors.name: InvalidSignature
errors.msg: Offer signature verification failed

errors.name: OfferExpired
errors.msg: Offer has expired

errors.name: OfferAlreadyFilled
errors.msg: Offer already filled (replay protection)

errors.name: ProtocolFrozen
errors.msg: Protocol is frozen - new trades disabled

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InsufficientAmount
errors.msg: Insufficient amount to cover fee

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid mint for token account

errors.name: InvalidCounterparty
errors.msg: Invalid counterparty

errors.name: CannotFund
errors.msg: Trade cannot be funded in current state

errors.name: CannotAccept
errors.msg: Trade cannot be accepted in current state

errors.name: CannotAcceptOwnTrade
errors.msg: Cannot accept your own trade

errors.name: CannotLock
errors.msg: Trade cannot be locked in current state

errors.name: CannotRelease
errors.msg: Trade cannot be released in current state

errors.name: CannotRefund
errors.msg: Trade cannot be refunded in current state

errors.name: LaneNotActive
errors.msg: Lane is not active

errors.name: InsufficientLaneBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance in lane vault

errors.name: AmountOutsideLaneBounds
errors.msg: Amount outside lane min/max bounds

errors.name: InvalidLane
errors.msg: Lane does not match offer

errors.name: NoLaneSpecified
errors.msg: Offer does not specify a lane

errors.name: EscrowExpired
errors.msg: Escrow has expired - auto-refund available

errors.name: NotExpired
errors.msg: Escrow has not expired yet

errors.name: NotDepositor
errors.msg: Only the depositor can extend escrow

errors.name: CannotExtend
errors.msg: Cannot extend - escrow already expired

errors.name: CannotConfirmPayment
errors.msg: Cannot confirm payment in current state

errors.name: NotBuyer
errors.msg: Only the buyer can confirm payment

errors.name: CannotDispute
errors.msg: Cannot dispute in current state

errors.name: NotParty
errors.msg: Only trade parties can open dispute

errors.name: NotDisputed
errors.msg: Trade is not in disputed state

errors.name: NotArbiter
errors.msg: Only authorized arbiters can resolve disputes

errors.name: MustUseDispute
errors.msg: Must use dispute resolution - payment already confirmed

errors.name: BuyerPayWindowActive
errors.msg: Buyer payment window still active - cannot cancel yet

errors.name: InvalidVault
errors.msg: Invalid vault account

errors.name: InvalidDepositor
errors.msg: Invalid depositor account

errors.name: InvalidV2AccountSize
errors.msg: Trade account is not the expected V2.2 size (150 bytes)

errors.name: InvalidTradeOwner
errors.msg: Trade account owner mismatch

errors.name: TradeAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Trade is already settled (Released or Refunded)

errors.name: CreatorMismatch
errors.msg: Creator account mismatch

errors.name: DisputeWindowActive
errors.msg: Dispute window has not yet elapsed

errors.name: InvalidExtension
errors.msg: Extension seconds must be positive

errors.name: ExtensionTooLong
errors.msg: Extension would exceed maximum trade lifetime

errors.name: PaymentNotStale
errors.msg: PaymentSent stale threshold has not elapsed

fields.name: extension_seconds
docs: Additional seconds to extend (e.g., 86400 for 24 hours)

types.name: Lane
docs: Liquidity Lane - Merchant's prefunded vault for instant matching

types.name: MatchOfferAndLockFromLaneParams
docs: Minimal params to reduce stack usage
The offer hash is verified client-side; we trust it if the signature is valid

fields.name: offer_hash
docs: SHA256 hash of the canonical offer

fields.name: ed25519_ix_index
docs: Index (in the current tx) of the Ed25519Verify instruction.

fields.name: ed25519_ix_index
docs: Index (in the current tx) of the Ed25519Verify instruction that

types.name: Offer
docs: This MUST be serialized identically across all clients
V2.2: Added lane_id for atomic matching via prefunded lanes

fields.name: lane_id
docs: Lane ID (v2.2) - 0 means no lane (fallback to two-step)

types.name: OfferFill
docs: Offer fill record (replay protection for v2.1)

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Single instance controls fees, treasury, and protocol state.
Authority can update mutable fields but cannot touch user funds.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Current protocol fee in basis points (250 = 2.5%)

fields.name: max_fee_bps
docs: Maximum allowed fee (immutable cap set at init)

fields.name: min_fee_bps
docs: Minimum allowed fee (immutable floor set at init)

types.name: Trade
docs: Trade PDA - tracks lifecycle and metadata

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Snapshot of protocol fee at creation (immutable)

fields.name: expires_at
docs: Escrow expiration timestamp (0 = no expiration, set when funded)
In Funded state: anyone can auto-refund after expiry
In Locked state: seller can cancel after buyer_pay_window

fields.name: payment_confirmed_at
docs: Timestamp when buyer confirmed payment (0 if not confirmed)

fields.name: disputed_at
docs: Timestamp when dispute was opened (0 if not disputed)

fields.name: dispute_initiator
docs: Who initiated the dispute (default = no dispute)
